title: Validation Factory Closeout -- core reusable validation factory complete (memo only)

provenance.head_note: HEAD 9523da8 is a descendant of the Factory-D10 commit 940e611; automation advanced HEAD but touched NO trading_research/agentic_factory file (git diff --name-only 940e611..HEAD -- trading_research/agentic_factory/ is empty).

1_factory_completion_summary.Factory-D1: Reusable validation runner PLAN ONLY (ladder A-L spec, data/git safety rules, lessons from parked branches). reports/factory_d1_reusable_validation_runner_plan/.
1_factory_completion_summary.Factory-D2: Standard validation report schema + writer. engine/validation_reports.py -- make_report / validate_report / write_report (refuse-before-write report.json + report.md).
1_factory_completion_summary.Factory-D3: IS-only baseline runner harness. engine/validation_is_runner.py -- runs one frozen callable on an explicit IS window; hard 2023/2024/2025 OOS seal at path AND bar-date layers.
1_factory_completion_summary.Factory-D4: OOS protocol + run enforcement. engine/validation_oos_runner.py -- refuses OOS without a committed protocol hash; refuses IS years / 2026 inside an OOS window; one-shot discipline.
1_factory_completion_summary.Factory-D5: Entry-significance integration. engine/validation_entry_significance.py -- same-count random-entry permutation test over FIXED horizons (no horizon shopping).
1_factory_completion_summary.Factory-D6: Sequence-risk / Monte Carlo integration. engine/validation_sequence_risk.py -- trade-order shuffle + bootstrap + top-winner dependence (the S25 path-luck lesson).
1_factory_completion_summary.Factory-D7: Regime / walk-forward / friction modules. engine/validation_regime.py + engine/validation_walk_forward.py + engine/validation_friction.py -- concentration, rolling-window stability, per-trade cost stress (the S26 lessons).
1_factory_completion_summary.Factory-D8: Final decision / readiness orchestration. engine/validation_decision.py -- maps per-module verdicts to one research decision + one readiness level; paper/live tiers unreachable on the default path.
1_factory_completion_summary.Factory-D9: Minimal safe CLI wrapper. engine/validation_cli.py -- list-modules / describe / synthetic-smoke / version; no dynamic import, no real-data run, no paper/live command.
1_factory_completion_summary.Factory-D10: Synthetic end-to-end smoke demo. engine/validation_synthetic_smoke.py + synthetic-e2e CLI command -- fake in-memory data drives the full ladder into per-module reports; no real strategy, no real market data.

2_what_the_factory_can_now_do: Generate a standard, schema-validated report.json + report.md for any module (validation_reports).
Run an IS-only baseline for a frozen strategy callable with a hard OOS seal (validation_is_runner).
Enforce OOS protocol pre-registration and one-shot OOS execution against a committed protocol hash (validation_oos_runner).
Wrap entry-edge significance testing across fixed horizons (validation_entry_significance).
Run trade-order Monte Carlo / bootstrap sequence-risk analysis (validation_sequence_risk).
Break a record down by regime, by rolling walk-forward window, and under a friction ladder (validation_regime / validation_walk_forward / validation_friction).
Map all module verdicts to one conservative research decision + readiness level (validation_decision).
Offer safe CLI discovery (list-modules / describe) and a synthetic-data smoke + end-to-end demo (validation_cli / validation_synthetic_smoke).
3_what_the_factory_cannot_do_yet: No automatic promotion of a candidate to any operational tier.
No real-money readiness -- PAPER_READY / LIVE_READY are unreachable without a separate readiness memo with explicit override fields.

4_parked_strategy_summary.donchian: PARKED (reference baseline only; profitable curve but ENTRY_EDGE_NOT_SUPPORTED + sequence fragility / path luck).
4_parked_strategy_summary.s26: PARKED -- PARK_CANDIDATE (OOS passed but thin FRICTION_SENSITIVE edge, INCONCLUSIVE entry/regime, single-year/post-2016 concentration).
4_parked_strategy_summary.s27: PARKED -- IS_FAIL (net-negative in-sample; stopped before OOS).
4_parked_strategy_summary.s28: PARKED -- IS_FAIL (net-negative in-sample; stopped before OOS).
4_parked_strategy_summary.operational_status: No strategy is paper-ready or live-ready. No active strategy.

5_safety_rules: Explicit pathspec commits only; never `git add .`; never `git add trading_research/agentic_factory/`.
No OOS run before a committed OOS protocol hash.
No strategy tuning after OOS (one-shot OOS discipline).
No paper/live promotion without a separate readiness memo (explicit override fields required).
Offline/inert modules only: no network, no broker, no data fetch, no dynamic code loading.
Hard OOS seal (2023/2024/2025) and 2026 block enforced inside the runners.

6_recommended_next_step.preferred: S29-D1: new strategy idea-sourcing memo (no code) that uses the factory lessons -- the core factory is now good enough for research use.
6_recommended_next_step.rationale: The reusable validation ladder (D1-D10) is complete and demonstrated end-to-end on synthetic data; the highest-value next move is sourcing a new frozen strategy hypothesis to run through it, not more factory infrastructure.

7_final_line: Factory core is complete for research validation. It is not a paper/live trading system.
trading_recommendation: NONE. Closeout memo only. Donchian, S26, S27, S28 remain PARKED; no active strategy; no paper/live system exists or is authorized.
